subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! O thou who art attracted to the Kingdom of Abha!
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
